---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an option, template improvement, or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem**
What friction or gap are you hitting?

**Proposed solution**
What would you like `create-cmp` to do? (e.g. a new option, nav shape, platform, integration.)

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you're using today.

**Reproducibility note**
Would this change the golden template or the version set? If so, note that it needs a green-build
re-verification.
